regions.name: top_navigation
regions.notes: Navigation shells and icon sockets may be styled, but tab labels, icon meanings, currency value, and state remain runtime-owned.

regions.name: status_panel
regions.notes: Account standing, help icon, explanatory copy, and appeal status remain live text.

regions.name: progress_rows
regions.notes: Progress labels, values, and bar fills remain runtime-owned.

regions.name: record_tables
regions.notes: Filters, headers, rows, ranks, scores, times, and empty-state values remain runtime-owned.
